blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the business value of observability for AWS infrastructure monitoring
- Learned the advantages of using Grafana Cloud provider AWS for unified monitoring
- Navigated to the AWS configuration interface in Grafana Cloud provider
- Created an AWS IAM role with appropriate permissions for secure metric collection
- Connected your AWS account to Grafana Cloud using role-based authentication
- Created a scrape job to customize metric collection for your specific AWS services
- Verified data was collected and sent from Amazon to Grafana Cloud
- Explored AWS service data using pre-built dashboards and analysis tools

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/)
